text:
Cleapatro (クレアパトロ, Kureapatoro) serves as the Supreme Magistrate at the Tier 1 Supreme Court aboard the Black Whale. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 371 

Appearance

Cleapatro is a lean individual with delicate features and thin, long eyebrows. Their headdress (or hairstyle) is reminiscent of that worn by women in ancient Egypt. They wear a light-colored uniform with a high collar and black stripes around it.

Personality

Cleapatro speaks calmly and professionally, making sure to consider a variety of factors in their decisions. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 376 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

After Barrigen's death in Room 1014, Loberry wonders why she is under arrest as Hashito restrains her. As Sakata explains to her that Barrigen was attacked right after she drew everyone's attention, he calls Supreme Magistrate Cleapatro and requests that Queen Seiko be charged under the suspicion of being an accomplice to Barrigen's murder and plotting to kill Prince Woble. Sitting at their bench in the Supreme Court on Tier 1, Cleapatro quickly denies Sakata's request, leaving him confused. They explain that circumstantial evidence is easy to fabricate and that it does not clear the Royal Family privilege protection regulation. They conclude by saying that they will dispatch an investigator to Room 1010 to monitor for 72 hours. 

The next day, Cleapatro presides at the hearing between Prince Benjamin and Prince Camilla. Acting as Camilla's lawyer, Nukuocon says that Camilla was fighting in self-defense after being fired upon by Musse. She adds that after Musse fled, Camilla pursued him and shot at Furykov and Wolfe because their guns were pointed toward her and she feared for her life. She again emphasizes Camilla's use of self-defense and argues that Benjamin and his personal army hand over Musse for the attempted assassination of Camilla. 

As Nukuocon reveals that they are also filing a suit against Benjamin on the suspicion of ordering the assassination, Balsamilco objects as Benjamin's lawyer. He points out that the dozens of shots fired at the unarmed Benjamin were excessive, adding that they are not harboring Musse. Nukuocon then requests that Benjamin's quarters be searched, and Balsamilco quickly requests that the same be done to Camilla's quarters. Cleapatro calmly says that they will ask the Royal Army to perform a search of both quarters. They add that until Musse is found, both Princes will be put under surveillance and confined to the VVIP area. They conclude by saying that their protection service can continue as usual, but they will assign an escort to accompany all outings, quickly saying that the court is adjourned as they use their gavel. 

On the eleventh day of the voyage, after Benjamin hears Balsamilco (who, unbeknownst to him, is possessed by Halkenburg's ego) report that Halkenburg had died, he tells Balsamilco to inform "Judge Clea" that they would drop all charges so that Halkenburg's guards can join him at once. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Cleapatro's name and general attire are based on Cleopatra, the famous Ptolemaic queen of Egypt who reigned from 51-30 BC. Although Cleapatro's gender is unknown, they are most likely a woman given the connection to Cleopatra.
